name: Daily Digest — Sheets → Claude → Gmail (manual or 8am scheduled)

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "ok": true,
  "summaryDate": {{ JSON.stringify($('Build Email HTML').item.json.summaryDate) }},
  "leads": {{ $('Build Email HTML').item.json.leads }},
  "hotLeads": {{ $('Build Email HTML').item.json.hotLeads }},
  "invoicesSent": {{ $('Build Email HTML').item.json.invoicesSent }},
  "totalInvoiced": {{ $('Build Email HTML').item.json.totalInvoiced }},
  "digestText": {{ JSON.stringify($('Build Email HTML').item.json.digestText) }},
  "emailSent": true,
  "timing": { "totalMs": {{ Date.now() - ($('Build Email HTML').item.json.startTs || Date.now()) }} }
}
